testsuite.name: rating acceptance — the saved scenarios, LIVE against the /quotes API (the RTM spine)

testcase.name: young-collision-ca — young driver, collision, California — the young-driver loading fires
prior-claims-comprehensive-ny — adult with prior claims, comprehensive, New York — the prior-claims surcharge fires
clean-liability-tx — adult, clean record, liability, Texas — the base case, no loadings
